data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. MISHAWAKA is better than last start when fourth (22.39) in a Grade 6 at this track over 380m. Has ability and is a key runner. 1. INVINCIBLE STEAL turned spotting a big start finishing seventh (22.46) last time in a Grade 6 at this track. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings three times from five attempts. In the mix. 2. STRAWBERRY WINE missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at this track following on from a second place finish (22.26) there the start prior. Can measure up this time. 3. BIG PAPA PARTY was in the money last start here at this trip - likely to feature again.","runners":[7,1,2,3],"exclusive":false}
